title: Pre-Placement Block Rotation
description: A client-side mod that lets you manually rotate and flip blocks before placing them, bypassing Minecraft's strict placement rules.
body:
![Pre-Placement-Block-Rotation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dev-jcwd/Pre-Placement-Block-Rotation/main/BANNER.gif)  

![Fabric Only](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-blue?logo=fabricmc&logoColor=white)
![Client Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client--Side-green)
![MC Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21%20→%201.21.9-yellow)

[![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Community-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/TubuNkwPam)

---

## ⚠️ BETA NOTICE

This mod is currently in **Beta**.

The current release is **Singleplayer Only**.

We are actively working on making the system compatible with **Multiplayer servers**, but due to how Minecraft handles block placement and synchronization, additional work is required.

Until then, please treat this version as **experimental**.

Expect:
• Possible bugs  
• Incomplete block compatibility  
• Future improvements  

Your feedback helps a lot!

---

# 🧱 What This Mod Does

Ever struggled to place an **Observer**, **Piston**, or **Stair** facing the exact direction you want?

Vanilla Minecraft often forces you to:

• Look in specific directions  
• Build temporary scaffolding  
• Place blocks multiple times just to get the correct orientation  

**Pre-Placement Block Rotation** removes those restrictions.

Rotate and flip blocks **before placing them**, giving you full control over orientation — even when looking straight up, straight down, or from awkward angles.

No more dirt towers.  
No more breaking and replacing blocks.  

Just **place it correctly the first time.**

---

# ✨ Features

## 👻 Perfect Sync Ghost Preview
See exactly how the block will be placed **before clicking**.

A translucent preview shows the **final rotation and orientation** in real time so you know exactly what you're placing.

---

## 🔓 Breaks Vanilla Direction Locks

Minecraft normally locks certain blocks depending on where you're looking.

This mod bypasses those restrictions.

Example:

Look straight down → place an **Observer facing North**.

No scaffolding required.

---

## 🧱 Universal Block Support

Works with most directional blocks including:

• Observers  
• Pistons  
• Dispensers  
• Logs & Pillars  
• Stairs  
• Slabs  
• Chests  
• Furnaces  
• Many more vanilla blocks

---

## ⚡ Quick Toggle

Enable or disable the mod instantly whenever you need it.

No menus required.

---

# 🎮 Default Controls

All controls can be changed in:

**Minecraft → Options → Controls → Rotation Placement**

| Key | Action |
|----|------|
| **R** | Toggle Mod ON / OFF |
| **Right Arrow** | Rotate Block Horizontally |
| **Up Arrow** | Flip Block Vertically |

---

# ⚙️ Compatibility

✔ Fabric Loader required  
✔ Client-side mod  
✔ Safe to install on servers (but functionality is **singleplayer only for now**)  

Supported Minecraft versions:

**1.21 → 1.21.9**

---

# 💡 Perfect For

• Redstone engineers  
• Technical builders  
• Creative builders  
• Anyone tired of Minecraft's placement restrictions  

Build faster and place blocks **exactly how you want**.

Want to request a mod for free? Join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/TubuNkwPam)
